SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Marianne Asbury et al.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

John G. Warner, esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Elizabeth Mamorsky and Melburn Knox. Plaintiff Elizabeth Mamorsky was not present. Plaintiff Melburn Knox was given the oath and gave testimony. Plaintiff's witness Rosemary Sheldon, Bookkeeper for Plaintiffs' company, was sworn and gave testimony.

No Appearance by defendant(s) Marianne Asbury, Terry Asbury, Kimberly Asbury, and Jessica Asbury.

Plaintiff's 1st Amended Complaint for Contract/Warranty was filed on Mar-25-2018.
Defendants' answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on Aug-10-2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on Aug-28-2019, setting trial for today, Mar-16-2020.

The Court reads complaint and accepts allegations are true. The Court finds that there has been a breach of contract by Marrianne & Terry Asbury.

Based on testimony of Plaintiff Melburn Knox and the entered evidence of the promissory settlement agreement, the Defendant has not been paid any of those funds. Based on the testimony the court finds as an expert witness, Rosemary Sheldon, the defendant embezzled $1,000,000 from the Plaintiff. No interest is sought on the $1000,000. The court will reward 10% on the $164,000.

Plaintiff submits an oral motion to dismiss Does 1 to 20 inclusive
Order re: Motion to Quash as to defendants Jessica Asbury and Kimberly Asbury was granted on Feb-05-2019

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff(s)Elizabeth Mamorsky and Melburn Knox, and against defendant(s) Marianne Asbury and Terry Ashbury, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $1,164,000
Interest at 10% (on $164,000) - $91,563.80
Total - $1,255,563.80

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
